description: Style NoteThis beautifully toned pair from catwalk are great to tone down a blingy ensemble or class up a simple monochrome theme. We love the colour patterning and overall design aesthetic of this lovely pair. Buy now before we run out of stock!   Product DetailsBlack sandal with a black synthetic strap on which there are pink elasticated criss-cross straps and a heel counter with a tang claspSmooth pink footbed with branding embossed on the heelPlastic outsole with textured rubber outsole on the forefoot and a heel    Material and CarePlastic and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight    SizeHeel: 3.5"
